news.headline: Ukrainians sceptical as Russia’s Putin orders Easter truce
news.summary:
Ukrainians on Friday were wary of Russia’s pledge to pause fighting for an Orthodox Easter ceasefire – first proposed by Kyiv – this weekend.

news.headline: ‘World doesn’t have a plan B’: Bilawal stresses need for US-Iran talks to lead to peaceful resolution of conflict
news.summary:
